title: Clean announce packet formats across Rust/Python
description: Examine and align rust/lichen-core/src/announce.rs, rust/lichen-node/src/announce.rs, python/src/lichen/announce/*.py with spec/05-routing.md:9, test/vectors/ccp9*.json, l2_payload.json. Remove merge artifacts/TODOs/dead code/worker comments ('Why:'). Ensure no_std compliance. Match pseudocode exactly. Use test vector oracles only for tests. Break into issues for codec, processor, tests, verification.
